name: Barcade
description: Arcade bars where adults already linger between games — prime dwell time for an impulse pull.

name: Brewery & Taproom
description: Taprooms full of regulars with time on their hands and a little money to spend.

name: Dive Bar
description: Neighborhood bars where a card machine becomes a conversation piece and a draw.

name: Pool Hall
description: Long sessions, repeat visits, and a crowd that loves a little side action.

name: Tattoo Parlor
description: Clients waiting and sitting for hours — the perfect captive, collectible-minded audience.
